notes: CIS Critical Security Controls provide prioritized, actionable security guidance. Controls are ordered by effectiveness and scaled for organization size through Implementation Groups (IG1-IG3). Maps to NIST CSF, ISO 27001, and other frameworks. Community-driven, consensus from practitioners.

data.description: 18 prioritized security control groups, each containing specific sub-controls (safeguards). Version 8 is current.
data.notes: CIS Controls v8 has 18 control groups with 153 safeguards. Implementation Groups: IG1 (essential cyber hygiene), IG2 (growing organizations), IG3 (advanced/mature). No per-control public URL — the full controls document requires registration to download. Maps to NIST CSF, ISO 27001.

versions_available.note: 18 control groups, 153 safeguards. Implementation Groups IG1-IG3.
20 control groups. Different structure from v8.

data.note: No per-control URL. CIS Controls document requires registration to download from cisecurity.org.
